[Table:

Graduation diplomas and grade transcripts, other education documents shall be attested at the Ministry of Education in Nigeria (digital with QR code preferable if available)
Visa documents attested at the High Court in Lagos or Abuja or in any other state, and public notaries will not be accepted anymore.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
n cases when the Lithuanian Migration Department has taken a positive decision to issue or renew an alien’s temporary or permanent permit in the Republic of Lithuania or when a
                                                                        temporary or permanent permit was lost. 
A completed and signed application form for National visa. An application is to be completed online at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
n cases when the Lithuanian Migration Department has taken a positive decision to issue or renew an alien’s temporary or permanent permit in the Republic of Lithuania or when a
                                                                        temporary or permanent permit was lost. 
A completed and signed application form for National visa. An application is to be completed online at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm).

## Visa Fees

[Table:
                                                                           Approved Migration]
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of NGN 18,630 all service charge are non-refundable and inclusive of applicable tax
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- All Fee and VFS service charges are to be paid by POS only at the application center in Naira.

## Documents Required

[Table:
                                                                           Approved Migration]
Please be informed that Copies of ID/passports, affidavits, sponsorship letters, and original bank statements shall be attested at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Nigeria (digital
                                                                        with QR code preferable if available).
Graduation diplomas and grade transcripts, other education documents shall be attested at the Ministry of Education in Nigeria (digital with QR code preferable if available)
Visa documents attested at the High Court in Lagos or Abuja or in any other state, and public notaries will not be accepted anymore. 

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 3-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against white background
- Distance of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Your visa application is going to be resulted approximately 45 calendar days following the date Embassy begins evaluating them. However, in some cases, this process may be extended up to 60 days.

## Application Form
https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania to engage in legal activities and is a participant of a private legal entity registered in the Register of Legal Entities (hereinafter
                                                                        referred to as the “company”) and established not earlier than 1 year before the date of submission of the alien’s application for national visa, as defined by the Civil Code of the
                                                                        Republic of Lithuania (hereinafter referred to as the “participant”) if the size of the company’s equity capital (in the case of a non-stock company or private limited company – assets)
                                                                        is at least EUR 28,000 of which at least EUR 14,000 are funds or other assets invested by the alien, or is the chief executive of a company established not earlier than 1 year before
                                                                        the date of submission of the alien’s application for national visa, the size of the company’s equity capital (in the case of a non-stock company or private limited company – assets)
                                                                        being at least EUR 28,000, and the purpose of his or her arrival is work at that particular company
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania to engage in legal activities and is a participant of a private legal entity registered in the Register of Legal Entities (hereinafter
                                                                        referred to as the “company”) and established not earlier than 1 year before the date of submission of the alien’s application for national visa, as defined by the Civil Code of the
                                                                        Republic of Lithuania (hereinafter referred to as the “participant”) if the size of the company’s equity capital (in the case of a non-stock company or private limited company – assets)
                                                                        is at least EUR 28,000 of which at least EUR 14,000 are funds or other assets invested by the alien, or is the chief executive of a company established not earlier than 1 year before
                                                                        the date of submission of the alien’s application for national visa, the size of the company’s equity capital (in the case of a non-stock company or private limited company – assets)
                                                                        being at least EUR 28,000, and the purpose of his or her arrival is work at that particular company

## Visa Fees

[Table:
                                                                           Legal]
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of NGN 18,630 all service charge are non-refundable and inclusive of applicable tax
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- All Fee and VFS service charges are to be paid by POS only at the application center in Naira.

## Documents Required

[Table:
                                                                           Legal]
Please be informed that Copies of ID/passports, affidavits, sponsorship letters, and original bank statements shall be attested at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Nigeria (digital
                                                                        with QR code preferable if available).
Graduation diplomas and grade transcripts, other education documents shall be attested at the Ministry of Education in Nigeria (digital with QR code preferable if available)
Visa documents attested at the High Court in Lagos or Abuja or in any other state, and public notaries will not be accepted anymore. 

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 3-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against white background
- Distance of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Your visa application is going to be resulted approximately 45 calendar days following the date Embassy begins evaluating them. However, in some cases, this process may be extended up to 60 days.

## Application Form
https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 A person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania to work as a teacher or conduct scientific researches and (or) experimental (social, cultural) development work as a researcher,
                                                                        having a labour contract or author’s contract signed with a science and research institution registered in the Republic of Lithuania, or a family member accompanying such a
                                                                        person 
A completed and signed application form for National visa. An application is to be completed online at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm).

visa_types.full_text:

A person is a sailor if the ship whose crew member he or she is, is being repaired in the Republic of Lithuania.

                                                                        of the Republic of Lithuania. 
A completed and signed application form for National visa. An application is to be completed online at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 A person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania to work and has a labour permit issued to the alien by the Employment Service under the Ministry of Social Security and Labour
                                                                        of the Republic of Lithuania. 
A completed and signed application form for National visa. An application is to be completed online at https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm).
                                                                    

## Visa Fees

[Table:
                                                                           Work Permit]
Please Note:
- There is a service charge of NGN 18,630 all service charge are non-refundable and inclusive of applicable tax
- The visa application centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost:
- All Fee and VFS service charges are to be paid by POS only at the application center in Naira.

## Documents Required

[Table:
                                                                           Work Permit]
Please be informed that Copies of ID/passports, affidavits, sponsorship letters, and original bank statements shall be attested at the Ministry of Foreign Affairs in Nigeria (digital
                                                                        with QR code preferable if available).
Graduation diplomas and grade transcripts, other education documents shall be attested at the Ministry of Education in Nigeria (digital with QR code preferable if available)
Visa documents attested at the High Court in Lagos or Abuja or in any other state, and public notaries will not be accepted anymore. 

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 3-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Taken against white background
- Distance of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Your visa application is going to be resulted approximately 45 calendar days following the date Embassy begins evaluating them. However, in some cases, this process may be extended up to 60 days.

## Application Form
https://visa.vrm.lt/epm (https://visa.vrm.lt/epm)

Overview
Person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania for seasonal work and has a permit for seasonal work extended by the Emplyment Service under the Ministry of Social Security and Labour

Person who arrives to the Republic of Lithuania for seasonal work and has a permit for seasonal work extended by the Emplyment Service under the Ministry of Social Security and Labour
                                                                        of the Republic of Lithuania if the overall period of employment exceeds 90 days, or an alien who has submitted an application for a new or extended permit for seasonal work
